newest.message:
# Bug Fixes
- Fix a crash on startup with blank local characters or characters with expired ESI tokens.

release.message:
# Bug Fixes
- Fix a crash on startup with blank local characters or characters with expired ESI tokens.

datafile.name: eve-blueprints-en-US.xml.gzip
